document_summary: This exhibit is the official Umeng+ report announcing the winners of the First 2019 UBDC 'Data Awards.' The report describes the award as one of the most influential in the mobile Internet field, jointly launched by Umeng+, Zhongguancun Big Data Industry Alliance, Tsingdata Big Data Industries Association, and China Big Data Industry Observation. A jury of 21 judges from authorities including Tsinghua University and Peking University reviewed candidates over two months. Seven award categories emerged, with 40 enterprises and 28 individuals selected. Liu won the Data Legacy of the Year Award in the individual category.

snippets.text: On Nov. 19, the 2019 Universal Big Data Conference with the theme of "Gathering in the Cloud · Seeing the Extraordinary" was held in Beijing. Xinyu Peng, CEO of Umeng +, Jinpeng Luo, President of Umeng + jointly discussed the trend and application of data intelligence with more than 40 well- known enterprise leaders and industry experts; shared how to establish a data intelligence platform, how to use the advantages of cloud technology to solve the problem of enterprise data, and jointly helped and promoted the industry to accelerate the process of data.
